mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emr_record_content (record_id, content_encrypted, content_masked, content_hash, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{contentEncrypted}, #{contentMasked}, #{contentHash}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO emr_diagnosis (id, record_id, diagnosis_type, diagnosis_code, diagnosis_name, is_primary, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{recordId}, #{diagnosisType}, #{diagnosisCode}, #{diagnosisName}, #{isPrimary}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO emr_diagnosis (id, record_id, diagnosis_type, diagnosis_code, diagnosis_name, is_primary, sort_order, created_at) VALUES
(#{diagnosis.id}, #{diagnosis.recordId}, #{diagnosis.diagnosisType}, #{diagnosis.diagnosisCode}, #{diagnosis.diagnosisName}, #{diagnosis.isPrimary}, #{diagnosis.sortOrder}, #{diagnosis.createdAt})
